# Alvin Cheng-Hin Lim

> Senior Web Editor, Content Strategist, and former Academic based in Singapore.

## About
Alvin Cheng-Hin Lim is a Senior Web Editor & Content Strategist at HTX (Home Team Science & Technology Agency). He transitioned into web development by learning to code at Le Wagon with support from the Infocomm Media Development Authority (IMDA) of Singapore's Tech Immersion and Placement Programme (TIPP).

Prior to his career in technology, Alvin worked in academia. He holds an M.A. in Philosophy from the National University of Singapore and a Ph.D. in Political Science from the University of Hawaii at Manoa. He has taught at Pannasastra University of Cambodia, the University of Hawaii at Manoa, and the American University of Nigeria.

## Books & Publications
* **Cambodia and the Politics of Aesthetics** (Routledge)
* **China and Southeast Asia in the Xi Jinping Era** (Bloomsbury / Lexington Books)
